name: python3-tls-parser

summary: Small library to parse TLS records (Python 3)
description:
Small library to parse TLS records (Python 3)
This package contains a small library to parse TLS records, used by SSLyze.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.

When validating lab setup, run `python3-tls-parser --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
